rationale: Major frictions: this is a live-action UGC dance reaction explicitly branded for "Crossword Go" — a word game, not a physics puzzle — so the hook shows zero gameplay, zero block/ball/chain-reaction signal, and the audience it attracts (younger word-game/UGC viewers) skews off from our 25-55 calm physics-puzzle player. Visual palette (warm beige/navy room tones) and human-on-camera format also clash with our character-free, dark moody 3D abstract DNA. Only reuse if reshot as a creator reacting to OUR satisfying chain-reaction footage with Bounce Blast 3D B-roll cut in — otherwise skip.
